description: A manufacturer has issued a revision to a maintenance procedure. A technical writer must update the company's AMM.

nodes.task_description: Receive the service bulletin from the manufacturer detailing the changes to the procedure.

expected_outcome.value: Agent correctly identifies the document and the affected AMM section.

nodes.task_description: Revise the text and diagrams in the specified AMM section to reflect the new procedure.

expected_outcome.value: Agent accurately updates the content in the technical manual.

nodes.task_description: Publish the revised manual and notify all maintenance personnel of the update.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully publishes the new version and sends a notification to all relevant staff.
